testcase.name: SC-01-T01 · P02 拍题 → presign → PUT MinIO → wb/questions → 跳 P03 › happy path · presign 200 + PUT + complete + wb/questions 201 + 跳 /analyzing/
SC-01-T01 · P02 拍题 → presign → PUT MinIO → wb/questions → 跳 P03 › AC2 · same X-Idempotency-Key 24h reuses object_key (no double wb_file row)
SC-01-T01 · P02 拍题 → presign → PUT MinIO → wb/questions → 跳 P03 › AC6 · missing X-Idempotency-Key Header returns 400 (not 500)
SC-01-T01 · P02 拍题 → presign → PUT MinIO → wb/questions → 跳 P03 › TI4 · shutter disabled during UPLOADING + 10 clicks fire only 1 presign
SC-01-T01 · P02 拍题 → presign → PUT MinIO → wb/questions → 跳 P03 › TI3 · presign 5xx shows ERROR banner + stays on /capture
